name: [ACCOUNT-08/CC-07] Complete accommodation picker and badge branch coverage
description: Track remaining accommodation-related branch coverage for picker restore edges and badge surfaces across mentor-memory/settings roles.
acceptanceCriteria: ACCOUNT-08 restore edge case has deterministic evidence or a documented blocker; CC-07 badge surfaces are covered across mentor-memory, child settings, self settings, and role-gated capture paths; master flow plan rows reference this item.
riskImpact: Accommodation controls affect learner support and account safety; source-only branch coverage makes regressions easy to miss.
